items.briefing:
Ransomware attacks are increasingly going undetected until after data has already been stolen, meaning organisations often don't realise they've been breached until it's too late to prevent the worst damage. Separately, cybercriminals are shifting their focus in the education sector — rather than attacking schools directly, they are targeting the software suppliers that schools and training organisations rely on, which could affect Australian RTOs using shared platforms or third-party tools.

**Practical tip:** Check with your software vendors that they have strong security practices in place — if a supplier is compromised, your data could be at risk too.

featured.title: In AI, control is the real advantage
featured.quote: Australian firms risk losing AI competitive advantage if core models remain controlled offshore.
